name: i2c
description: i2c — Global card issuing and payment processing platform supporting debit, credit, and prepaid programs for fintechs and banks.

seo.title: i2c — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: i2c: i2c — Global card issuing and payment processing platform supporting debit, credit, and prepaid programs for fintechs and banks.

when_to_use: Debit, credit, and prepaid card issuing for fintechs and challenger banks
Global card program management platform for digital-first financial products
Card processing and program management for bank and non-bank issuers
Instant virtual card issuance API for corporate expense fintech products

pros: Handles debit, credit, and prepaid programs
cons: Legacy feel compared to Marqeta or Lithic
review.verdict: Battle-tested global processor for banks and large fintechs — overkill for startups, right for scale.
review.best_for: Banks and enterprise fintechs launching global card programs at scale
review.not_for: Seed-stage teams needing a fast self-serve virtual card API

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
